name: python3-lsassy
title: python3-lsassy
description:
Extract credentials from lsass remotely (Python 3)
This package contains Python library to remotely extract credentials on a set
of hosts.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use lsassy because Extract credentials from lsass remotely (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use lsassy as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `lsassy [options] [args]` as documented upstream for lsassy.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair lsassy with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `lsassy --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
